_comment_file: Grouped default parameters for Agentic Data Modeler. See metadata/README.md for merge rules and governance.

scope._comment: Discovery boundary: LOB, domain, and table filtering patterns. Charter §3: 'One explicitly selected LOB and domain per bounded execution slice.'

source._comment: Source system identity. Charter §6: 'isolate solution runs and source authorization boundaries and enforce least-privilege access.'

output._comment: Output locations for all deliverables. Charter §5: Delta tables are authoritative; Excel is review format. Separate schemas support independent lifecycle management when needed.

knowledge_pack._comment: Governed knowledge input. Architecture §4.1: 'versioned manifests and non-sensitive pack assets.' Pack must be approved and in-date for use.

profiling._comment: Data profiling governance. Charter §4: 'minimized and approved source profiles.' Adaptive sampling uses more rows for small tables, respects privacy controls.

contracts._comment: Contract schema version. Must match deployed DDL in output.schema. Updated to 0.3.0 after registration field removal.

versioning._comment: Reproducibility versions. Charter §6: 'reproduce outputs from versioned evidence, context, model, prompt, skill, and configuration snapshots.' Increment when any of these change materially.

governance._comment: Authorization and approval controls. Charter §6: 'prevent automatic approval of material model artifacts.' Reviewer can modify drafts; approver transitions to APPROVED state.

execution._comment: LLM execution controls. Low temperature (0.1) for consistent semantic analysis. Charter §6: 'meet agreed quality, cost, latency... thresholds.'
